summary: Fine audience tape capturing a spirited Hampton ’85 show with standout China Cat > I Know You Rider, Alabama Getaway and a powerful L.L.R. → Might As Well sequence.
review: The audience recording is generally clear and lets the vocal work of Jerry shine, though drum sections are lost during a tape‑flip.  The concert itself is praised for a strong first set (Alabama Getaway, China Cat > Rider, Wharf Rat) and an inspired second half highlighted by L.L.R. into Might As Well and a spirited Other One jam.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show highly (4‑5 stars) and note good performance, while several call the tape marginal or point out missing drum portions; overall rating lands around a solid 4.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear audience mix with Jerry's vocals audible; drums are cut during a tape‑flip and occasional tape‑noise, but overall listenable.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as strong and spirited with solid song choices; second set solid though some reviewers found the selection less exciting, overall a cohesive, high‑energy Hampton performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mixed views – some felt his stage presence was listless, others praised his vocal work and guitar on this night.
band_member_comments.Bob: Positive mentions of Bob being 'really on' during the show.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drum tracks are missing in sections due to a tape flip.
